items.title: Is there a deadline to claim the $1,000 ‘Trump account’ contribution for my kid?
items.description: Some children who don’t qualify for the government contribution may be eligible for an initial $250.

items.title: Stock pickers know they can’t outsmart the market. That doesn’t stop them from trying.
items.description: How to satisfy your inner trader without derailing your long-term investment goals.

items.title: Geopolitical shock exposes SK Hynix leverage after hot ADR debut
items.description: Just one trading session after a highly successful U.S. listing for its depositary receipts, local shares in South Korean chip maker SK Hynix plummeted 15% on the domestic exchange in Seoul.

items.title: These biggest and ‘least loved’ stocks are the ones to pick ahead of earnings
items.description: Profit growth will overcome artificial intelligence concerns and lift the S&P 500, says Evercore ISI.

items.title: Why prediction markets like Polymarket and Kalshi often fail the average investor
items.description: Big traders don’t always know best.

items.title: I’m 67 with a $140,000 pension. Should I wait until 70 to claim Social Security so my wife gets more?
items.description: “When I pass, all my retirement income is reduced to $30,000 a year.”

items.title: ‘It’s heartbreaking’: My brother claimed Social Security at 70. He died from cancer after one payment. Why wait to claim?
items.description: “I’ve always been a little skeptical of the government’s encouragement to delay claiming benefits.”

items.title: The stock-market rally now hinges more on AI than oil
items.description: As earnings season kicks off, AI investment remains front and center.

items.title: The No. 1 decision for aging retirees: Stay at home or move into a senior community?
items.description: Why staying in your longtime home requires more planning than you think.

items.title: ‘I’ve no idea how they got her number’: My student-loan servicer called a friend after I missed a payment. Is that legal?
items.description: “She said it’s the second message they have left.”
